links.targetTitle: Chat 1-to-1 PSS messaging with feed-indexed history shipped

global.title: Chat polish backlog: Swarm-link previews, search, avatars, reactions
global.content:
## Smaller polish items (pick up any time)

All items are known gaps in the shipped chat; none are blocked on the live-collab track.

- **Swarm-link previews in the Files tab.** `MessageBody` already detects `bzz://` URLs and renders inline, but `FilesTab` only iterates `msg.attachment`. Extend the `files` `useMemo` to also sweep `msg.text` for references and synthesize `AttachedFile` entries.
- **Search inside messages.** Current search only scans the Files tab.
- **Profile avatars.** Conversation list and message bubbles use initials today. The public profile already carries an optional image ref -- wire it through.
- **Message deletion / edit.** No UI, no adapter flow. Feeds are append-only, so "delete" means writing a tombstone message.
- **Message reactions.** Small GSOC payloads keyed by message id.

## Explicit out-of-scope

**Group chat is out of scope for live collab** and needs its own design pass. Don't conflate multi-user document collaboration with group-chat conversations -- the data model and invariants differ.
global.description: Parked chat polish items: Swarm-link previews in Files tab, in-message search, profile avatars, delete/edit, reactions. Group chat is out of scope for live collab.
